encounters.trigger: Destroying the construct core triggers a portal sequence to the Zenith Throne

pickup.name: Star-Forged Key
pickup.effect: Unlocks the boss chamber's core containment system

encounters.trigger: Defeating the sentinel summons the Celestial Overlord

boss.name: Celestial Overlord
boss.victory_condition: Insert the key into the Overlord's chest core to disable its divinity

normalized.objective: Decommission the Celestial Overlord to prevent the collapse of the dimension
normalized.reward: Architect of the Void Title and Cosmic blueprints

encounters.trigger: Deactivating the observatory console triggers an alarm that summons the next entity.

pickup.name: Ionic Battery
pickup.effect: Restores shields and supercharges machinery.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the relay causes a power spike that reveals the hidden boss chamber.

pickup.name: Gravity Anchor
pickup.effect: Stabilizes movement and disrupts energy fields.

encounters.trigger: Opening the gate allows the boss to manifest in the center of the arena.

pickup.name: Star Core Shard
pickup.effect: Permanently boosts mechanical efficacy.

output.objective: Repair the celestial array before the supernova consumes the sector.

boss.name: The Solar Archon
boss.victory_condition: Overload the Archon's core while it is tethered by the Star Core Shard.

output.setting: A crumbling orbital station drifting near a dying star.
output.reward: Control over the sector's energy flow and the title of Lead Station Architect.
